message: Update 1.0.4: BIO-SYNTH V2.4 holographic heart + snappy Force & Motion (~1–2s drop). Close all windows and reopen to install.
releaseNotes: 1.0.4 — Same Bio-Synth V2.4 + fast physics as 1.0.3, new build number so the in-app updater must offer DOWNLOAD UPDATE. Simulations → Bio-Synth Heart. Force & Motion vacuum drop ~1–2s.
